title: The Rock Becomes the Key
description: On pages 1–4, the rock becomes the key focuses on Sanji, Nojiko, Genzo, Luffy as the fight centers on freeing Luffy from underwater before Arlong’s crew can finish the Straw Hats.
scene: On pages 1–4, the rock becomes the key focuses on Sanji, Nojiko, Genzo, Luffy as the fight centers on freeing Luffy from underwater before Arlong’s crew can finish the Straw Hats.

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: If I can just destroy that rock, he'll finally be able to fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're the only one we have left that can put up a proper fight!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I don't know what's going on down there but brother cook's actions seem to be the key to clutching victory!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Come on, Brother Zoro! Hang in there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's said that the sea robs devil fruit users not only of their abilities,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But also every bit of their energy as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The fact that that RUBBER BRAT isn't dead by now,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: means that somebody's been unfairly interfering in our "game!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Please come out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huh? What happened to your pinwheel?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But it looked so cool.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who the hell cares about that right now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: unfairly interfere!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I personally never considered this game to be a fair one from the beginning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: even so, I do need to see who's been doing the interfering.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Alright! All we have to do is not let Arlong go into the waters, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, Arlong!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Over here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'll stop you dead in your tracks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: B-Brother USOP!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're so brave! I

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: 23-year-old

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Rub- her band!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You standing before me,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: means that you want me to kill you first, right, Roronoa Zoro!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now, Zoro! Attack!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The hell are you even trying to do!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'll break that nose you're so prod of!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ugh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fool... It's because my nose won't break,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That I'm so proud of it!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Just perhaps! If you were in better health...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You might have left a little scar on it!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
